primary_snippet.content:
import React from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'
import Panel from '~/components/Panel'
import { cn } from 'ui'
import { detectBrowser, isBrowser } from 'common'

const ProductCard = ({
  className,
  title,
  subtitle,
  highlights,
  icon,
  image,
  url,
  onClick,
  alignLeft = false,
  isDatabase,
}: {
  title: string
  subtitle: string | React.ReactNode
  highlights?: string | React.ReactNode
  url: string
  icon?: string
  image?: any
  className?: string
  onClick?: any
  alignLeft?: boolean
  isDatabase?: boolean
}) => (
  <Link
    href={url}
    className={cn(
      'group relative w-full sm:h-[400px] flex flex-col gap-5 lg:flex-row focus:outline-none focus:border-none focus:ring-brand-600 focus:ring-2 focus:rounded-xl',
      className
    )}
    onClick={onClick}
  >
